title: AlgoEvolve: LLM-driven Meta-evolution of Algorithmic Trading Programs
abstract: arXiv:2606.26173v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: Recent work shows that Large Language Models (LLMs) can act as semantic mutation operators for the evolutionary discovery of programs and proofs. Most current applications focus on static coding benchmarks. We extend this paradigm to algorithmic trading. This domain is uniquely challenging because it is noisy, non-stationary, and highly discontinuous. We present AlgoEvolve, an LLM-driven evolutionary framework that generates, evaluates, and iteratively improves executable trading strategies. These strategies are expressed as Python code and evaluated through a rigorous testing protocol. Across multiple experiments, the system exhibits emergent regime-adaptive strategy logic, including autonomous shifts in trading rules. We further introduce a meta-evolutionary outer loop that evolves the prompts guiding program synthesis in the inner loop. This outer loop discovers improved search heuristics. These heuristics balance exploration and expl

Abstract: arXiv:2606.26173v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: Recent work shows that Large Language Models (LLMs) can act as semantic mutation operators for the evolutionary discovery of programs and proofs. translated_title: AlgoEvolve：基于大语言模型的算法交易程序元进化方法
translated_abstract: 近期研究表明，大型语言模型（LLMs）可作为语义变异算子，用于程序与证明的进化发现。当前多数应用聚焦于静态编码基准测试。我们将这一范式扩展至算法交易领域。该领域因具有噪声、非平稳及高度不连续等特性而极具挑战性。我们提出AlgoEvolve框架——一种由LLM驱动的进化框架，可生成、评估并迭代改进可执行交易策略。这些策略以Python代码形式表达，并通过严格测试协议进行评估。多项实验表明，该系统展现出涌现性的市场状态自适应策略逻辑，包括交易规则的自主切换。我们进一步引入元进化外层循环，通过进化引导内层程序合成的提示词，从而发现改进的搜索启发式方法，这些方法能有效平衡探索与利用。
tldr: 提出AlgoEvolve框架，利用LLM驱动进化算法生成可执行交易策略，并通过元进化循环优化提示词，实现市场状态自适应策略逻辑的自动发现与改进。
en_tdlr: AlgoEvolve proposes an LLM-driven evolutionary framework that generates executable trading strategies, and introduces a meta-evolutionary outer loop to optimize prompts, enabling emergent regime-adaptive strategy logic.
